baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 225 tests passed, 15 skipped.

scheduleCancellationUi.summary: Calendar selected match and event panels expose manager-only cancellation, validate missing reasons, call the cancel API, refresh schedule data, and render cancellation reasons.

dbCheck.summary: Supabase contract check passed for 18 SQL files during the final guard run.

guardVerify.summary: Final verify guard passed after syncing this workstream: design guard passed for 2 guarded files, diff guard passed for 5 changed files, baseline passed, DB contract check passed, and evidence guard passed.

runtimeSmoke.summary: No app entrypoint, Auth/session/API bootstrap, package/runtime config, Supabase schema, or API route files changed.

issuesObserved: Calendar state previously filtered cancelled matches, which would have prevented selected calendar panels from showing the cancellation reason after refresh.
harnessImprovementProposal: No harness change proposed; the existing deterministic UI evidence policy covered this UI/store behavior change.
retrospective.reason: The work followed existing UI evidence and diff ownership rules without exposing a repeatable harness gap.
